title: Omit recursive decomposition recommendations for child tasks
context: When executing /q-brief or /q-status, recommending /q-decompose for child tasks (those with parent_task set) leads to redundant or invalid decomposition commands.
content: We decided to conditionally filter next-step recommendations based on task hierarchy. Specifically, we omit `/q-decompose` from next-step suggestions in `/q-brief` and `/q-status` for any task that has the `parent_task` field populated. Recommending `/q-decompose` is restricted solely to parent or standalone tasks to prevent recursive decomposition attempts.
anti_patterns: Do not recommend task decomposition for sub-tasks or children since they are already decomposed and must be implemented as single atomic units of work.
